metadata.name: Advise a Buyer Interested in a FSBO

description: A buyer represented by an agent wants to make an offer on a home being sold 'For Sale By Owner' (FSBO).

nodes.task_description: Contact the FSBO seller to introduce yourself and confirm they are willing to cooperate with a buyer's agent and pay a commission.

expected_outcome.value: Agent establishes communication and confirms commission agreement.

nodes.task_description: Advise the buyer on the risks and nuances of dealing with an unrepresented seller.

expected_outcome.value: The buyer is well-informed about the process.

nodes.task_description: Draft and submit the purchase offer directly to the seller, explaining the terms clearly.

expected_outcome.value: The offer is submitted and explained to the unrepresented seller.
